$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema URI used by editors.

entry.description: Entry files or glob patterns. Exports in entry files are ignored unless includeEntryExports is true.

project.description: Project source files or glob patterns to analyze for unused files and exports.

testFilePatterns.description: Test files or glob patterns. Matching files are treated as leaf files: their imports do not count as production usage except for exports annotated with leading JSDoc @internal, and fixes remove tests that reference removed project files or exports.

ignore.description: Glob patterns to exclude from analysis.

aliases.description: Import specifier aliases. These override package.json imports and may use wildcard keys such as #generated/*.

unresolvedImports.description: Controls how unresolved imports are handled.

ignore.description: Unresolved import specifier glob patterns to ignore.

ignoreExportsUsedInFile.description: Do not report exported symbols that are referenced in their declaring file.
